title: Best. Thing. Ever.
excerpt: Jack is 3 months old today. And yesterday as we sat in my newly organized and now workable studio, he did something that made my heart burst. Not only did Cindy laugh so hard she cried, but she managed to…
body:
Jack is 3 months old today. And yesterday as we sat in my newly organized and now workable studio, he did something that made my heart burst. Not only did Cindy laugh so hard she cried, but she managed to capture his first laugh on video. I was sitting across the table from him and have no idea how it started, but we just wanted it to keep on going. He actually did this continuously for about 2 minutes, but I figured I'm probably the only one (besides JC and our parents) who want to watch it for that long. Hope it not only brightens your day but makes you giggle a little too.

Jack's first laugh from amy tan on Vimeo.
